text:
Greenhouse keeping. We spent some time untangling quest logic this week. If you've been doing pollen top-ups (including Polar), your achievements should actually track correctly now—exact 100s count, and we split legacy from launch quests so things make a bit more sense.

Oh, and REKTY AI just joined the bot roster. Go say hi.

Everything is live. Code is in the open.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #gamedev #openAI #developer
